features: THE PERFECT GIFT FOR FOOTBALL FANS: Ideal for birthdays, Father’s Day, Christmas, or any special occasion. A thoughtful keepsake for Dads, Sons, Grandads, or anyone proud to wear their team colours
PREMIUM QUALITY PRINT: Professionally printed on thick matte paper for a crisp, vibrant finish. Every design is carefully produced to order using high-resolution artwork for lasting quality

FULLY PERSONALISED DESIGN: Create your own football shirt print featuring any team colours, player name and number. Add a custom title and message to make it a one-of-a-kind gift for any football lover
FRAME OPTIONS AVAILABLE: Choose between A4 or A3 sizes with optional modern wood-effect frames in black, white or oak. All frames are made in the UK and come ready to hang or display
description: Celebrate Liverpool or your favourite team with this personalised football shirt print – a modern, illustrated design that’s fully customisable for any player, fan or occasion. Whether it’s a birthday gift, Father’s Day surprise or something special for your little football legend, this design is made to look like their shirt, their number, and their name. Customise every detail: ⚽ Choose any team shirt – colours and patterns available for all clubs. 👕 Add any name (up to 12 characters, no spaces). 🔢 Pick your favourite number (1–99). 💬 Include a line of text below the shirt – up to 12 words (e.g. No. 1 Football Fan, The Gaffer, Little Legend). 🏅 Select an emblem to go beneath the text – Football, Trophy, Boots, Captain Band, Goalie Gloves, or Heart Ball. Prints are available in: ↠ A4 21x29.7cm (250GSM) ↠ A3 29.7x42cm (220 GSM) Frames are also available to showcase the print in style: ↠ Available in A4 & A3 sizes ↠ Manufactured in the UK ↠ Colours include black, white & oak effect ↠ Deep frames feature a wider and deeper border ↠ All frames come with a shatter resistant perspex front ↠ A4 frames can be stood up ↠ All frames can be hung on the wall ↠ Frames come with the print already mounted Shipping: ↠ A4 prints are securely wrapped and posted in a hardback protective envelope ↠ A3 prints are rolled and carefully placed in a protective postal tube ↠ Frames are carefully packaged in bubble wrap and a sturdy cardboard box ensuring that they arrive in pristine condition
